description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir Docker image with a postgres:latest service. Set variables MIX_ENV=test, POSTGRES_DB=grow_journal_test, POSTGRES_HOST=postgres, POSTGRES_USER=postgres, POSTGRES_PASSWORD='' for the test environment. In a global before_script run apt-get update, apt-get install -y build-essential postgresql-client git, then mix local.hex --force, mix local.rebar, mix deps.get, mix ecto.create and mix ecto.migrate. Add a test job named test that runs in the default test stage and executes mix test. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
